final_prompt.prompt:
Create a short-form video vertical cover for an 8k GGU gaming monitor product launch, intended for Douyin / TikTok / Xiaohongshu short video cover.

Style/medium: minimalist premium tech product poster, short video cover
Composition: rule of thirds, large typography dominant
Subject: 8k GGU gaming monitor 1000hz, global debut new panel, low latency, perfect color
Scene/backdrop: clean tech-forward backdrop, subtle gradient or solid premium surface
Lighting/mood: sleek, premium, high-end tech atmosphere
Color palette: minimalist palette — deep black / gunmetal / electric blue accents
Materials/textures: matte finish, subtle metallic sheen, crisp typography
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" (main headline), "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" (subhead)
Constraints: vertical format optimized for mobile, large bold headline for thumb-stopping impact, text must dominate frame, clean negative space
Avoid: cluttered layout, small text, generic gaming RGB overload, busy backgrounds
